$comment: Descriptive specification — NOT a deployable Logic App workflow. The runtime that consumes ACS Event Grid IncomingCall events, drives Call Automation, and brokers STT↔topic-router↔TTS does not yet exist in this repo (see apps/voice/README.md § Voice runtime readiness and docs/biz/voice.md § 11.5). This file is the blueprint that the future Function App / Logic App must implement.
name: udcsp-live-transcription-route
trigger: ACS call connected event (Microsoft.Communication.IncomingCall via Event Grid)
steps: Stream call audio to Azure AI Speech STT
Send transcript chunks to Foundry topic-router via APIM /agents/topic-router/messages
Route to the Foundry topic-router agent by intent/language (post-audit: replaces the previous Copilot Studio dialog)
Escalate to D365 human agent when escalation policy matches (apps/voice/escalation/escalation-config.yaml)
Persist redacted transcript metadata for audit (ADLS Gen2 voice-recordings/, anchored in Confidential Ledger)
